content_body: Our weekend in the cabin Serendipity was indeed just that! The house was spectacular! The views were amazing, the beds were comfy, and the property grounds were breathtaking. The owners were also extremely kind people. Their children, Travis and Taylor organized most of our activities with genuine enthusiasm for helping us create memories. Being a parent myself, I can't help but share how outstanding these kids are. I really can't put into words how special this experience was. From the excitement of jet skis on the lake to the tranquility of sitting on the deck watching the sunset, the whole experience was amazing. As we were leaving, my brother's 7 year old son said "if this was the best weekend of your life, raise your hand". That really sums it up! We will certainly be back!
title: The Best Weekend Of Our Lives
